/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bseal_pipeline_gtests.dir/pipeline/TestWorkQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_pipeline_gtests.dir/pipeline/TestEncryptPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_pipeline_gtests.dir/pipeline/TestDecryptPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_pipeline_gtests.dir/pipeline/TestMultiWorkerPipeline.cpp.o -o bseal_pipeline_gtests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igellai/miniconda3/lib ../libbseal_core.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../libblake3_static.a ../libargon2_static.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
